title: Classic Star Wars Volume 2: The Rebel Storm
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars Vol. 2}} {{ComicCollection |image=[[File:The_Rebel_Storm.jpg]] |title=''Classic Star Wars Volume 2:
The Rebel Storm'' |writer=[[Archie Goodwin]] |penciller=[[Al Williamson]], [[Allen Nunis]], [[Monty Sheldon]] |inker= |letterer= |colorist=[[Steve Buccellato]], [[Ray Murtaugh]] |cover artist=[[Al Williamson]] |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[July]] [[1995]]{{DarkHorse|url=Books/44-422/Classic-Star-Wars-Vol-2-The-Rebel-Storm-TPB|text=Classic Star Wars, Vol. 2: The Rebel Storm TPB}} |other date= |media type=Trade paperback |pages=208 |isbn=1569711062 |isbn2= |timeline=[[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] |series=''[[Classic Star Wars]]'' |issues=2 |preceded by=''[[Classic Star Wars Volume 1: In Deadly Pursuit]]'' |followed by=''[[Classic Star Wars Volume 3: Escape to Hoth]]'' }} '''''Classic Star Wars Volume 2: The Rebel Storm''''' was the second trade paperback collection of issues from the ''[[Classic Star Wars]]'' series of [[Star Wars comic books|comics]]. ''The Rebel Storm'' collects ''Classic Star Wars'' issues 8-14. It was published in [[July]] [[1995]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''There was no peace for the crew members of the ''Millennium Falcon'' between ''Star Wars'' and ''The Empire Strikes Back''! Follow their adventures as they plunge head first into an underwater hunt that leads to a demonsquid, a treasonous and plotting Kraaken, the ferocious night beast, lost power gems, stranded Calamarians, and giant sea worms! Will the depths of the oceans spell defeat for the Rebels, or will they emerge victorious?'' ==Contents== *[[Classic Star Wars 8|''Classic Star Wars'' 8]] *[[Classic Star Wars 9|''Classic Star Wars'' 9]] *[[Classic Star Wars 10|''Classic Star Wars'' 10]] *[[Classic Star Wars 11|''Classic Star Wars'' 11]] *[[Classic Star Wars 12|''Classic Star Wars'' 12]] *[[Classic Star Wars 13|''Classic Star Wars'' 13]] *[[Classic Star Wars 14|''Classic Star Wars'' 14]] ==Media== ===Cover gallery=== File:CSWv2TRS-LEC.png|Cover art File:The_Rebel_Storm.jpg|Dark Horse cover ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{DarkHorse|url=Books/44-422/Classic-Star-Wars-Vol-2-The-Rebel-Storm-TPB|text=Classic Star Wars, Vol. 2: The Rebel Storm TPB}} {{Interlang |ka=კლასიკური ვარსკვლავური ომები, ტომი 2: აჯანყებულთა გრიგალი |nl=Classic Star Wars Volume 2: The Rebel Storm }} [[Category:Classic Star Wars trade paperbacks]]
